name: Lightweight Carbon Trekking Poles (Pair)
description: Pair of 3-section folding carbon fibre trekking poles with cork handles, anti-shock system, and tungsten carbide tips.

reviews.title: Excellent lightweight trekking poles
reviews.reviewText: Carbon fibre construction makes these noticeably lighter than aluminium poles. They fold down small enough to attach to a backpack and the cork handles are comfortable over long days. Anti-shock works well on steep descents.

reviews.title: Perfect poles for multi-day treks
reviews.reviewText: Light, stiff, and genuinely comfortable. The cork absorbs sweat well on warm days and the packed length is brilliant for backpacking. I used these on a 5-day mountain route without issue.

reviews.title: Great carbon poles but check sizing
reviews.reviewText: Very well made and noticeably lighter than my old aluminium poles. The three sections clip together securely. Just be sure to check the length range against your height before buying.
